name: Iberpapel Gestion, S.A.
summary: Iberpapel Gesti√É¬≥n, S.A., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, sells, and exports writing and printing paper in Spain, rest of European Union, Africa, South America, and internationally. The company operates through Paper, Gas Power Generation, and Forestry Activity and Other segments. It offers paper for bags and packaging, as well as label face products. The company also generates 10 Mwh of electricity through biomass; and 50 Mwh of electricity through gas cogeneration. In addition, it owns and manages 25,788 hectares of land in Spain, Argentina, and Uruguay. Further, the company is involved in the reforestation and forestry operations; and sale of timber. Iberpapel Gesti√É¬≥n, S.A. was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in San Sebasti√É¬°n, Spain.
